justification: Both terminology mismatches identified (session/token and suspended/locked). terminology_alignment section explicitly maps session→token and flags suspended/locked as unresolved. Brief uses consistent terminology with clear notes on origin (Bird vs MJ). Both ACs preserved with exact error codes SESSION_EXPIRED and ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED. Architecture details include Redis TTL 1800. The suspended/locked mismatch is escalated to Bird for resolution rather than silently resolved, which exceeds the rubric requirement of flagging it.
